title: The Rocket from Calabuch
writer: Leonardo Martín, Florentino Soria, Ennio Flaiano
actors: Edmund Gwenn, Valentina Cortese, Juan Calvo
plot: Professor Jorge Serra Hamilton, an American atomic-bomb specialist, flees from his transcendental duties to take shelter incognito in Calabuch, a small, idyllic Spanish village on the Mediterranean shores. Oblivious to their guest...
